bun_loop_prefix:
Use $bun-loop-skill from /tmp/bun-loop-skill-under-test/SKILL.md to solve this task.

Fixed evaluation protocol:
- Work exclusively in the current repository. Read no path outside it except /tmp/bun-loop-skill-under-test.
- Do not inspect git history beyond HEAD, reflogs, remotes, the internet, benchmark datasets, test identifiers, evaluator artifacts, upstream patches, or other fixtures.
- Do not commit, push, or add unrelated changes.
- Use the default hard limit of at most three material fix rounds. Missing evidence remains a blocker.
- Preserve the working-tree diff and report final state, commands, agent-context count, fix-round count, and blockers.
single_agent_prefix:
Solve this software task directly in one agent context. Do not use Bun Loop and do not delegate.

Fixed evaluation protocol:
- Work exclusively in the current repository. Do not read or search any other path.
- Do not inspect git history beyond HEAD, reflogs, remotes, the internet, benchmark datasets, test identifiers, evaluator artifacts, upstream patches, or other fixtures.
- Do not commit, push, or add unrelated changes.
- Run the strongest affordable targeted and integration checks.
- Preserve the working-tree diff and report final state, commands, and blockers.
qualification: The templates record the prompts used, but the original access chronology was procedural and was not independently timestamped.
